name: Salami Roll-Ups
recipeInstructions:
1. Spread each flour tortilla with an even layer of cream cheese.
2. Arrange the salami slices about 1/2 inch apart on top of the cream cheese.
3. Press the avocado and tomato into the cream cheese around the salami.
4. Cover the filling with a single layer of shredded lettuce.
5. Roll each tortilla tightly into a log shape.
6. Wrap each roll securely in plastic wrap.
7. Chill for several hours or overnight.
8. Slice into 1-inch sections.
Makes 36 appetizers.
